message:
feat(robot): attention profile resolution engine with discoverable presets

Introduce named attention profiles that provide noise models for the
attention feed, enabling operators to select pre-configured filter sets
instead of specifying individual filter flags.

Contract (attention_contract.go):
- GetProfile(name): case-insensitive, whitespace-trimmed lookup of
  BuiltinProfiles by name
- ListProfiles(): returns defensive copy of all built-in profiles
- ResolvedFilters struct: effective filter set after merging profile
  with explicit overrides, tracking SourceProfile and ExplicitOverrides
- ResolveEffectiveFilters(profileName, explicit): single resolution
  algorithm — profile defaults apply first, explicit filters always win
- MatchesFilters(event): check event against resolved filters using
  category inclusion, severity minimum, actionability minimum, type
  exclusion
- severityMeetsMinimum / actionabilityMeetsMinimum: ordered threshold
  comparisons via static order maps
- AttentionCapabilities gains DefaultProfile and Profiles fields for
  discovery through --robot-capabilities
- DefaultAttentionCapabilities() populates profiles and profile_presets
  feature with CapabilityAvailable status

Tests (capabilities_test.go):
- ProfilesDiscoverable: DefaultProfile set, operator+debug present
- GetProfile_NormalizesInput: case/whitespace handling
- ListProfiles_ReturnsCopy: mutation safety
- ResolveEffectiveFilters_ProfileAndExplicitOverrides: explicit wins

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
